385.reason: [This condition can cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when token_index is at the last position, and doesn't properly handle the case where there are no functions]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This should check tokens.get(token_index).type == TokenType.INTTK first, then tokens.get(token_index + 1).type == TokenType.MAINTK, and can cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException]
